title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!
